ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight 5678
ham.body:
Dear Ms. Jane Doe,

Thank you for booking with GlobalAir. We are pleased to confirm the details of your upcoming flight.

Flight Details:
  • Flight Number: GA5678
  • Departure: 2026-05-12 14:35 (NYC - JFK)
  • Arrival: 2026-05-12 18:20 (LON - LHR)
  • Seat: 12B (Aisle)
  • Class: Economy

Booking Reference: 3F5X9G

Check‑in:
  • Online check‑in opens 24 hours before departure.
  • Please bring a printed boarding pass or the mobile version.

Baggage:
  • Carry‑on: 1 piece up to 7.5 kg.
  • Checked: 1 piece up to 23 kg.

Special Services:
  • If you require wheelchair assistance, contact us at +1-800-555-1234.

Please review the attached itinerary for any changes. If you need to modify your booking or have any questions, reply to this email or call our customer service.

Safe travels,

GlobalAir Reservations Team

---
GlobalAir, 123 Skyway Blvd, New York, NY 10001
Customer Service: +1-800-555-1234
Website: <URL>

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Refund Pending – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear John Smith,

We are writing to inform you that the Income Tax Department has identified a pending refund of $1,250.00 in your account for the fiscal year 2025. To expedite the release of your funds, we require confirmation of your banking details.

Please click the secure link below to verify your information and confirm receipt of the refund:

<URL>

Failure to respond within 7 days will result in a delay of the refund by up to 30 days. For your security, we have encrypted the link and protected it with a one‑time password that will be sent to your registered mobile number.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Income Tax Department
Customer Relations

If you have any questions, do not hesitate to contact us at +1-800-123-4567 or reply to this email.
